user_task_description: The second slide is only a placeholder, but the first slide already contains enough context to draft operational risk points.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Generate three concise risk bullets on Slide 2 based on the information already present on Slide 1.
atomic_scope: Only content generation for Slide 2 is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with generated risk bullets on Slide 2.

inspired_by.title: Need the best slides generator for work - any recommendations?
